cause_analysis.narrative: CenterPeace Wellness churned on 2026-02-28 after 377 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-28 (email) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: competitive switch. The client mentioned an alternative provider before cancelling. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Competitive] Client mentioned a competitor on 2026-02-04 — log this to Product + Sales for competitive positioning work.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-24 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Quick Check-In\n\nBody: I’m getting on the call now On Wed, Feb 4, 2026 at 1:20 PM Shikha Singh < shikha.s@…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
